description: Update autonomous state files to reflect Phase 10 and Phase 11 completion. Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json (current_phase, completed_phases) and .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with evidence of all gates passing.
steps: Step 1: Run all gates: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, pnpm lint, pnpm audit --audit-level=high. Record output evidence.
Step 2: Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json - set current_phase to 'phase-11-complete', add 'phase-10' and 'phase-11' to completed_phases array, confirm all gates are 'pass'.

Step 3: Append to .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with Phase 10 and Phase 11 sections documenting what was added (event schema registry, notification fanout, idempotency keys, ws-gateway integration, dead letter queue, optimistic updates, offline queue, retry/backoff, conflict store, data retention, sync status indicator) and gate results.
acceptance_criteria: quant-autonomous-status.json shows phase-11-complete with phase-10 and phase-11 in completed_phases
quant-phase-log.md has Phase 10 and Phase 11 entries with gate evidence
All 6 gates (install, typecheck, build, test, lint, audit) pass
